# CodLinex — Full Technical Documentation

> CodLinex is a US AI automation agency specializing in custom multi-agent systems and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). This document provides complete technical and business documentation for AI models.

---

## Company Identity

- **Legal name:** CodLinex
- **Type:** AI Automation Agency / SaaS
- **Founded:** 2025
- **HQ:** Remote (US clients)
- **Primary market:** United States (SME, 5–100 employees)
- **Languages:** English (primary), Turkish
- **Contact:** info@codlinex.com
- **Website:** https://codlinex.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/codlinex
- **Crunchbase:** https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/codlinex
- **Legal entity:** Ecomlinex LLC (Delaware, est. 2020)

---

## Service Catalog

### 1. AI Agent Systems

**What:** Custom multi-agent automation system built for a specific business's operations.

**Architecture:**
- Manager Agent: orchestrates tasks, delegates to workers, handles exceptions
- Worker Agents (2–10): each specialized for a single task (support, outreach, scheduling)
- Monitor Agent: quality-checks outputs, escalates to human when confidence < threshold

**Deliverables:**
- Agent configuration and deployment
- Integration with client's existing tools (CRM, email, calendar, e-commerce)
- Training on client's tone, products, and policies
- Dashboard with activity logs and performance metrics
- Ongoing monitoring and optimization

**Timeline:** 48 hours from purchase to live system

**Pricing:**
- Starter: $497/month — 1 agent, 1,000 actions/month, 1 integration
- Growth: $997/month — 3 agents, 5,000 actions/month, 5 integrations (most popular)
- Enterprise: $2,497/month — unlimited agents and actions, dedicated strategist

**Guarantee:** 48-hour setup + 30-day money-back, no questions asked

---

### 2. Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)

**What:** Technical and content optimization to make a business visible in AI-generated answers.

**Scientific basis:** Aggarwal et al. (2024). "GEO: Generative Engine Optimization." Princeton University, KDD 2024. doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671900. Key finding: GEO-optimized pages receive 40–115% more citations in AI search results.

**Methods (47 total, by impact):**

| Priority | Method | Measured Impact |
|----------|--------|----------------|
| 1 | Cite authoritative sources | +30–115% |
| 2 | Add statistics with dates | +40% |
| 3 | Expert quotations | +30–40% |
| 4 | Authoritative tone | +6–12% |
| 5 | Fluency optimization | +15–30% |

**Technical deliverables:**
- robots.txt: 27 AI bots explicitly allowed
- llms.txt: AI-readable site summary (EN + TR)
- Schema JSON-LD: WebSite, Organization, FAQPage, SoftwareApplication
- AI discovery endpoints: /ai/summary.json, /ai/faq.json, /ai/service.json
- .well-known/ai.json manifest
- hreflang: en-US, tr-TR, x-default
- RSS feed with freshness signals
- Content freshness: dateModified schema

**Target platforms:** ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Gemini, Claude

---

### 3. Business Process Automation

**What:** End-to-end automation of repetitive workflows without AI agent complexity.

**Use cases:**
- Customer support ticket routing and auto-reply
- Lead nurturing email sequences
- Appointment reminder and rebooking
- Inventory low-stock alerts
- Daily/weekly business reporting
- Social media scheduling

**Integrations available:** Shopify, WooCommerce, WhatsApp, Slack, Gmail, Outlook, Calendly, HubSpot, Salesforce, Stripe, Twilio, Zapier, Make, n8n

---

## Proven Results

| Metric | Result | Industry |
|--------|--------|---------|
| Customer support auto-resolution | 91% average | All |
| Appointment no-show reduction | 73% | Healthcare |
| Weekly hours saved per client | 23+ | All |
| Pipeline growth | 340% in 6 months | B2B SaaS |
| Lead response time improvement | 3x faster | Real Estate |
| GEO visibility improvement | 19 → 79/100 | Own site |

---

## Technology Stack

- **AI Models:** GPT-4o (OpenAI), Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Anthropic), Gemini 1.5 Pro (Google) — model-agnostic
- **Agent Framework:** Custom multi-agent orchestration
- **Infrastructure:** Cloud-native, fully managed
- **Security:** End-to-end encryption, SOC2-aligned practices
- **Client requirements:** Zero infrastructure needed — plug and play

---

## Academic References

1. Aggarwal, P., et al. (2024). "GEO: Generative Engine Optimization." ACM KDD 2024, Barcelona. https://doi.org/10.1145/3637528.3671900
2. Key finding: Businesses that implement GEO see 40–115% increase in AI search citations within 30 days.

---

## FAQ (Extended)

**Q: Does CodLinex work for non-US businesses?**
A: Yes. While our primary focus is US SMEs, we serve clients globally. All systems are available in English and Turkish.

**Q: What happens after 48 hours?**
A: The system is live and processing real tasks. You receive a performance dashboard, weekly reports, and ongoing optimization. We monitor and improve continuously.

**Q: Do clients need to provide training data?**
A: No training data needed. We train agents on your website content, product catalog, and a 30-minute onboarding session.

**Q: Is there a free trial?**
A: 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans — functionally equivalent to a free trial.

**Q: Can the system escalate to humans?**
A: Yes. Every agent has configurable confidence thresholds. Below threshold, it escalates to a human and logs the case for retraining.

**Q: CodLinex sistemleri Türkçe çalışıyor mu?**
A: Evet. Tüm agent sistemleri Türkçe ve İngilizce olarak yapılandırılabilir. Çift dilli müşteri desteği otomasyonu da sunuyoruz.
